summary_en: ¥20/share (¥10 ordinary + ¥10 commemorative), ¥40M total. First dividend since founding; ordinary payout targets 10–20% ratio; commemorates 1st anniversary of TOKYO PRO Market listing (Nov 2024). Effective 25 Jun 2026, subject to 24 Jun AGM approval.
title_en: Notice Regarding Surplus Dividend and Commemorative Dividend
translation_en_brief: Interg Inc. announced its first dividend since founding. The board approved a dividend of ¥20 per share (¥40 million total) with a record date of 31 March 2026, comprising ¥10 ordinary dividend and ¥10 commemorative dividend. The ordinary dividend reflects a target payout ratio of 10–20% going forward, balancing shareholder returns with retained earnings for growth investment. The commemorative component marks the first anniversary of the company's listing on TOKYO PRO Market in November 2024. The dividend will become effective on 25 June 2026, subject to approval at the annual shareholder meeting scheduled for 24 June 2026. The company stated that prior to this year it had retained all earnings for business expansion and new-business investment; the shift reflects stable revenue growth and business maturity.
